/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/RedisLiteTesting.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/RedisLiteTesting.dir/testing/RedisLiteTesting/RedisLiteCLI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedisLiteTesting.dir/src/redisLite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedisLiteTesting.dir/src/hashFunction.cpp.o -o RedisLiteTesting  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
